title: VIP_SMP - Season 1
description:
The Modpack used for VIP_SMP Season 1

This is a modified version of Vanilla Perfected by demonjoeTV, thanks for the amazing base pack.
body:
**WHAT COULD MINECRAFT 2 LOOK LIKE? - This pack aims to bring minecraft into the modern age without losing the vanilla feel! Featuring: Massively increased FPS, Cooler HUD and UI elements, Mob Animations, New Minecraft Dungeons inspired structures, Massive QOL Updates, Multiplayer Support, and Much More!**

This is the modpack used by the [VIP_SMP](https://3pfreakillz.wixsite.com/vipsmp) Season 1 server

This pack is a modified version of [Vanilla Perfected](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-perfected) by demonjoeTV, thank you for the amazing base pack to work from. We have kept all the mods and packs included with Vanilla Perfect, while also adding several more to create the server experience we are after. If you are interested in applying for VIP_SMP look for us on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/server/vip-modded-vanilla-minecraft/).

Modifications to Vanilla Perfected: -all mods and resource packs can be looked up here on modrinth for further details on each.-
- Added: Ambient Sounds
- Added: Armor Trim Preview
- Added: Better Beacon Placement
- Added: Bridging Mod
- Added: Camerapture
- Added: Clean F3
- Added: Dynamic Lights
- Added: Easy Anvils
- Added: Easy Magic
- Added: Flower Pots +
- Added: Keep My Soil Tilled
- Added: Make Bubbles Pop
- Added: Shield By Side
- Added: Simple Voice Chat
- Added: SnowyLeavesPlus
- Added: Spyglass Improvements
- Added: Terrastorage
- Added: Trade Cycling
- Added: Visible Traders

Features: 
1) **SIGNIFICANT PERFORMANCE OPTIMIZATION AND SHADERS**
Shaders come standard bundled with the pack and fully functioning with no need of Optifine. We have included the majority of perofrmance enhaning mods available to fabric which allow minecraft to run at significantly improved FPS regardless of your personal system specs. Come enjoy MC in a silky smooth world. Easily achieving FPS well over 200!
1) **SMOOTHER ANIMATION BETTER GRAPHICS**
We have implemented many mods that give mobs, players, villagers, and more fresh modern animations.We have added graphics packs that add subtle things that you may not even notice at first but when it all comes together it makes the world just look that much better. We have also implemented UI improvements that are more clean, and more functional these combine to make Minecraft feel like a much more modern game.
3) **BETTER QUALITY OF LIFE**
This pack brings fresh sorting meechanics for inventory, better villager trade management, improved enchanting, better tool management, and more. We worked hard to clean up those feels bad things that are currently in Minecraft. Updating the game to have the QOL features you would expect today.
4) **MULTIPLAYER LOVE**
We have added single player sleep, proximity voice, and even a camera to save moments with your friends on a server. This pack was made with multiplayer in mind, still great as a standalone modpack, but as the title says this is for VIP_SMP!
5) **WHAT WOULD MINECRAFT 2 LOOK LIKE?**
Our goal behind this pack was to imagine if Mojang released Minecraft 2, what could it look like? Our goal with this project is to keep the vanilla play integrity while bringing the game into the modern age. Remove feels bad mechanics, add farmability to items that do not have it, such as sand. Make the game look and feel over all just plain better!
   
Thanks VIP Team
